title: Plantar fasciitis
license_notes: Use as public patient-education source support. Avoid verbatim copying into primitives.
supports: Plantar fasciitis causes pain and inflammation in the thick tissue on the bottom of the foot.
Pain is often near the heel and can be worse with first steps after rest.
Supportive care may include rest, stretching, footwear changes, and clinician-directed pain control.
Trauma, inability to bear weight, infection, neuropathy, diabetic foot risk, or vascular compromise require a different pathway.
